channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Origin Lab raises $8M to help video game companies sell data to world-model builders
item.description: Origin Lab will serve as a marketplace where AI labs can buy high-quality licensed data, and video-game companies can sell it.

item.title: This surprise retailer has all others beat if you want an RTX 5060, 5070, or 5080 gaming laptop — save $600 on a machine with 32GB of DDR5 RAM
item.description: This unlikely retailer is offering RTX 5060, 5070, and 5080 gaming laptops with 32GB of DDR5 RAM for the best prices of the year so far.

item.title: Garmin's top-rated smartwatches are up to $200 off at Amazon — here are the 12 best deals for running, hiking, and swimming
item.description: Amazon has a huge sale on Garmin's top-rated smartwatches for spring and summer, and I'm rounding up the 12 best deals for running, swimming, and hiking.

item.title: Several Overwatch heroes are about to hit Fortnite
item.description: Epic Games might be doing more to mark Overwatch's 10th anniversary than Blizzard is.

item.title: US Congress calls Instructure CEO as it investigates Canvas breach
item.description: Steve Daly was called in to testify about the two ShinyHunters incidents that left students stranded.

item.title: Android I/O: Surfshark's Alternative ID will make Android 17's 'Spoofing Protection' feature even better at stopping scam calls
item.description: Why give them your real number in the first place? This mobile phone fake ID will have the hackers running around in circles.

item.title: Galaxy Unpacked : Samsung prévoit d’autres surprises en plus de ses smartphones pliants
item.description: Six produits annoncés en un seul événement, dont les toutes premières lunettes connectées du géant coréen. Le Galaxy Unpacked de juillet s'annonce comme le plus dense de l'histoire de Samsung.

item.title: Anthropic courts a new kind of customer: small business owners
item.description: Anthropic is looking to broaden its customer base from larger enterprise customers to smaller and mid-sized businesses.

item.title: Ces créatures survivent à tout… sauf à Mars : cette expérience intrigue les scientifiques
item.description: Les tardigrades sont les survivants ultimes du règne animal microscopique. Pourtant, face au sol de Mars simulé en laboratoire, même eux capitulent. Une expérience menée début 2026 par l'université d'État de Pennsylvanie vient de le prouver. Ses implications pour la colonisation martienne sont...

item.title: The iPhone Ultra could be a surprise hit as new survey suggests potentially millions of Apple fans would buy a foldable phone
item.description: According to a new survey, 14% of iPhone users say 'new phone concepts' is their biggest reason for upgrading, which bodes well for the fortunes of the iPhone Ultra.

item.title: Elon Musk just can't stop (potentially) violating the Clean Air Act
item.description: xAI has reportedly added 19 more unpermitted methane gas turbines to its latest data center site.

item.title: I was already convinced I'd buy the Steam Controller when available — but this secret feature just solidified my future purchase
item.description: Valve has implemented what is possibly the funniest feature I've ever seen in a PC controller, with the Steam Controller, discovered by users dropping it.

item.title: Ransomware hackers claim breach at Foxconn, a major electronics manufacturer for Apple, Google, and Nvidia
item.description: A ransomware group has claimed responsibility for hacking the electronics manufacturing giant Foxconn, and is attempting to extort the company.

item.title: Microsoft doesn’t want any of this
item.description: Maybe I'm just punch drunk in my third week attending Musk v. Altman, but I have become very, very fond of Microsoft during the course of this trial. They don't want to be here any more than I do. Their opening statement was honestly one of the most Microsoft things I've ever seen. More than […]

item.title: Sony ups its new A7R VI to 66.8 megapixels and jumps the price to $4,500
item.description: Sony announced its new flagship high-resolution camera, the A7R VI. The standout feature is its fully stacked full-frame sensor with 66.8 megapixels of resolution and up to 16 stops of dynamic range. That's only an increase of about six megapixels for the VI model, but its stacked architecture means a much faster readout speed for […]

item.title: How to watch Coppa Italia final 2026: Free streams and TV channels for Lazio vs Inter Milan
item.description: All the ways to watch Coppa Italia final 2026 live streams online – including for FREE – with Lazio vs Inter Milan set to light up Stadio Olimpico.

item.title: Fight high gas prices with $5 off a Shell gift card
item.description: As of May 13, get $5 off a $50 Shell gift card and get more gas for less.

item.title: Samsung Galaxy Watch 9, Fold 8, Galaxy Glasses to debut at July Unpacked event, leak reveals
item.description: Samsung's next Unpacked event will allegedly feature a huge array of upcoming devices, including Galaxy smart glasses.

item.title: Live updates from Elon Musk and Sam Altman’s court battle over the future of OpenAI
item.description: Sam Altman and Elon Musk are facing off in a high-stakes trial that could alter the future of OpenAI and its most well-known product, ChatGPT. In 2024, Musk filed a lawsuit accusing OpenAI of abandoning its founding mission of developing AI to benefit humanity and shifting focus to boosting profits instead. Elon Musk, his financial […]

item.title: Test du Trust GXT 499 Forta Wireless : un casque sans-fil sous licence PlayStation à moins de 100 euros
item.description: Trust, connue pour ses appareils au prix attractif, revient chatouiller les oreilles des joueurs avec un casque sans-fil sous licence officielle PlayStation : le GXT 499 Forta Wireless.

item.title: Inside the humanoid robot factories of Figure and 1X
item.description: Figure and 1X share new footage from their humanoid robot factories, revealing how each company is building the technology.

item.title: Pour moins de 30 €, il est possible d’acquérir ce chargeur de 45 W avec son petit écran amusant
item.description: Compatible avec de nombreux produits, ce chargeur Anker de 45 W va rapidement devenir un produit indispensable. C'est le moment de se pencher dessus puisqu'il est actuellement affiché à 29,99 euros contre 39,99 euros de base.

item.title: Google Fitbit Air vs Whoop: should you get Fitbit's new screenless tracker or opt for the more expensive, subscription-based original?
item.description: Should you buy Fitbit's new tracker or opt for a Whoop band, which offers fantastic metrics but is wholly reliant on a more premium subscription?

item.title: Amazon just dropped the price of this fully loaded Asus gaming laptop by $310
item.description: As of May 13, you can get a 16-inch Asus V16 gaming laptop for $1,189.99, down from $1,499.99. That's a 21% discount or $310 savings.

item.title: That awful gold Trump phone will reportedly ship this week
item.description: They were supposed to be made in the US, but instead were "designed with American values in mind."

item.title: The $650 start up: 9 essential tools to launch a business this week
item.description: How to start an online business for less than $650

item.title: Trump’s tax cuts are colliding with inflation as voters consider candidates for the midterms
item.description: Trump’s tax cuts from his Big Beautiful Bill are no match for the surging costs of basic necessities in the U.S. Standing behind a downtown bar, Evan Duke smiled when he thought about no longer paying federal income tax on the hundreds of dollars in tips he earns on a busy night pouring beers and mixing drinks.But the 30-year-old said he cannot afford health insurance and worries about how higher costs for rent, food and fuel are affecting him and the patrons who slip cash into the jar at Pearl & Peril.“It’s kind of messy right now,” Duke said.Duke’s dilemma is an economic microcosm of Donald...

item.title: The FBI just remotely reset thousands of home and small office routers – and your TP-Link could be on the hitlist
item.description: The FBI obtained court-authorization to reset thousands of routers remotely, so they could kick lurking Russian hackers out of compromised networks

item.title: The DJI Flip drone is finally back at a record-low price at Amazon — save over $100
item.description: The DJI Flip with RC 2 is on sale at Amazon for $509, down from the standard price of $639. That's a 20% discount.

item.title: Is this the Pixel 11 Pro? Google edits out Pixel 10 Pro selfie camera during The Android Show broadcast, inviting speculation about its next flagship
item.description: Google seemingly edited out the Pixel 10 Pro's selfie camera during its Android Show broadcast, potentially teasing the Pixel 11 Pro.

item.title: À vendre : robot de 500 kg qui défonce des murs – Prix : 500 000 euros
item.description: Un robot de 500 kg qui marche sur deux jambes, défonce un mur de briques et se transforme en quadrupède. Le tout avec un humain à l'intérieur. Et il est en vente.

item.title: Rachat de SFR : la fuite des abonnés a-t-elle déjà commencé ?
item.description: Au premier trimestre 2026, Orange et Bouygues Telecom affichent une nette croissance avec plusieurs dizaines de milliers de nouveaux abonnés. Cette tendance pourrait s’expliquer par l'exode d'une partie de la clientèle de SFR, qui craint un démantèlement imminent de l'entreprise ou décide de prendre les devants.

item.title: Garmin’s mini satellite communicators are on sale for up to 40 percent off
item.description: REI’s annual Anniversary Sale doesn’t start until March 15th, but that hasn’t stopped Garmin from rolling out discounts on a range of devices — including its InReach Mini satellite communicators. Right now, for instance, you can grab the Mini 2 at Amazon, REI, and Garmin for $249.99 ($150 off) or the Mini 3 for $399.99 ($50 […]

item.title: Trump's Inner Circle Is Already Scrambling Over the 2028 Presidential Ticket
item.description: Republicans still have the midterms to get through, but administration officials have already set their sights on the next election.

item.title: IKEA outdoor trends: bold brights and playful shapes to bring even more sunshine to your yard
item.description: Playful furniture and accessories to bring a bit more sunshine to your yard or balcony.

item.title: SFR Fibre Starter : 3 avantages qui rendent l’offre unique sans faire flamber son prix [Sponso]
item.description: Faire baisser le prix de son abonnement fibre se fait souvent au détriment de la qualité de service. Avec sa Fibre Starter à 27,99 euros par mois, SFR fait exception à la règle et promet de bons débits, un décodeur TV 4K et même les appels illimités vers l’étranger.

item.title: Amazon launches an AI shopping assistant for the search bar, powered by Alexa+
item.description: Alexa for Shopping is a new personalized AI shopping assistant in the Amazon search bar that replaces its Rufus assistant.

item.title: Solaire de balcon : la nouvelle batterie Bluetti peut-elle vraiment vous faire économiser 1 600 € par an ?
item.description: L'entreprise chinoise Bluetti a dévoilé à Paris sa gamme de batteries solaires Balco, trois produits pensés pour rendre le solaire de balcon réellement plug and play. Au programme : deux stations et un hub qui convertit n'importe quelle batterie portable en mini-centrale raccordée au réseau.

item.title: Make cleaning more efficient with $700 off the Dreame X50 Ultra robot vacuum and mop
item.description: As of May 13, save $700 on the Dreame X50 Ultra robot vacuum and mop.

item.title: Anduril raises $5B, doubles valuation to $61B
item.description: After achieving $2.2 billion in revenue in 2025, the defense tech startup has raised another massive round, led by Thrive and a16z, it says.

item.title: r/WallStreetBets really hates the SEC’s proposal to weaken quarterly reporting
item.description: The retail trading subreddit submitted the sharpest criticism yet in response to the financial regulator's idea of letting companies report twice per year.

item.title: Chinese ‘cellular modules’ could be included in new expansion of federal restrictions
item.description: In banning Chinese-made cellular modules, the FCC could cause serious disruption to the supply chain of many electronic goods.

item.title: Audemars Piguet and Swatch made a $400 ‘pop’ pocket watch
item.description: Following a series of cryptic newspaper ads and Instagram teasers that had watch fans speculating about its next collaboration, Swatch announced a new timepiece collection created with luxury watchmaker Audemars Piguet. Inspired by Swatch's iconic Pop watches from the '80s and Audemars Piguet's Royal Oak timepieces that first debuted in 1972, the new Audemars Piguet […]...

item.title: What new AI design tools mean for brand typography
item.description: The bad news: they make your brand appear safe and generic. The good news: brands that distinguish themselves can stand out even more. Anthropic has just announced Claude Design, a tool that lets teams generate and iterate visual design outputs through natural-language prompts. On the surface, it’s hard not to like the proposition: competent layout and typography on demand, fewer blank-page moments and faster shipping for everything from landing pages to pitch decks....

item.title: Russian official admits completely banning VPNs is 'simply impossible'
item.description: A top Russian official has admitted that banning VPNs is technically impossible without breaking the country's internet infrastructure.

item.title: US lawmakers demand answers from Instructure after Canvas data breaches
item.description: U.S. House lawmakers want to know how hackers broke into education tech giant Instructure twice, and stole reams of data from students who use the company's flagship student data software Canvas.

item.title: Oppo décide déjà de casser le prix de son dernier smartphone premium, le Reno 15 Pro
item.description: Habituellement proposé à 799 euros, l'Oppo Reno 15 Pro chute à 599 euros. C'est une occasion en or de s'équiper d'un smartphone puissant et polyvalent à un prix plus doux.

item.title: Why sovereign cloud starts with smarter workload placement
item.description: Moving from a public, private or hybrid cloud environment into a sovereign one demands real planning.

item.title: Google unveils new Android security tool looking to help spot spyware attacks
item.description: Intrusion Logging is now available on the newest Pixel models, with more devices getting it soon.
